title: Settings
subtitle: Preferences that shape how Margen reads and what it calculates.

error.title: Settings unavailable
error.description: We couldn't load your settings. Check your connection and try again.

saveError.notAllowed: That value isn't allowed. Pick one from the list.
saveError.generic: We couldn't save that change. Try again.

currency.label: Display currency
currency.helper: The currency for the Home metric cards and monthly summaries. ARS stays the stored value; USD converts at your default rate.

fxDefault.label: FX default source
fxDefault.helper: The dollar rate pre-selected when you add a USD transaction, and used for the USD display conversion.

monotributo.title: Monotributo

module.label: Monotributo module
module.helper: Turn on the Monotributo tracker for Argentine freelancers. When off, its nav item, Home card, and page are hidden.

category.label: Category
category.helper: Your current Monotributo category. Drives the limit meter and projection on the Monotributo page.

monotributo.activityServicesTitle: Activity type is services in this version

manualThreshold.note: Thresholds are manually maintained · AFIP scale {{year}}

displayCurrency.fallback: Showing ARS — couldn't fetch a USD rate.
